stimulus: In the 2000s, conservationists began planting hundreds of thousands of native shrubs across coastal dunes to support a struggling shorebird population. This effort was clearly ______blank: the shorebird population grew from fewer than 200 nesting pairs in the early 2000s to more than 1,200 nesting pairs today.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical and precise word or phrase?
rationale: Choice B is correct because "effective" means achieving the intended result, matching the rise in nesting pairs. Choice A is incorrect because the project’s success isn’t about being amusing. Choice C is incorrect because cost isn’t discussed. Choice D is incorrect because the outcome was positive.
